creator: robert.ayrapetyan@gmail.com
text:
Thunar FM occasionally freezes when "View->Side Pane->Tree" is selected.
Changing it to "View->Side Pane->Shortcuts" resolves the problem.

The issue is similar to https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/+source/thunar/+bug/1233904?comments=all, which was classified as duplicate of https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/+source/gvfs/+bug/1231978 which in turn was resolved by updating gvfs to ver. 1.18.2 (the latest version of gvfs package in FreeBSD is 1.12.3).
